organic-instant-transfer-fees-are-a-scam.hook: Instant transfer fees are a SCAM — and I have the receipts 🧾

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0-8s): Creator on phone, visibly annoyed, shows a $14.99 wire fee notification — 'They charged me THIS to send my own money?'. Beat 2 (9-25s): Screen-record of a competitor app showing fee breakdown vs. Speed Wallet showing $0 fee on same send amount. Beat 3 (26-45s): 'With Speed, I sent $200 to my mom in 11 seconds. Zero fees. She got every dollar.' Quick reaction shot of 'received' confirmation. Beat 4 (46-60s): CTA overlay — 'Link in bio. First send is on us.' Creator points to camera.
payload.production_notes: Film in one take on iPhone. Use native TikTok caption burn-in for fee numbers. No green screen needed — authentic frustration is the production value. Post Tuesday 6-8 PM local time for diaspora commuter scroll window.

organic-pov-you-just-found-bitcoin-in-20.hook: POV: You just found Bitcoin in 2009 😭 — except the version that actually WORKS right now

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0-7s): Text-on-screen over dark background: 'POV: It's 2009. 1 BTC = $0.001. You didn't buy.' Sad sound effect. Beat 2 (8-25s): 'But here's the version of Bitcoin most people still don't know exists' — cut to Lightning Network explainer with animated arrows showing instant send, $0 fees. Beat 3 (26-45s): Screen-record of Speed Wallet: download → create wallet → receive first sat in under 60 seconds. Creator voiceover: 'This is the easiest I've ever seen Bitcoin work.' Beat 4 (46-60s): 'You don't need to understand blockchain. You just need this app.' App name on screen, link in bio.
payload.production_notes: Hook leans into index-3's proven 1.9M-view nostalgia frame. Text-on-screen for beats 1-2, phone screen-record for beat 3. Use trending melancholic audio from TikTok library. Creator does NOT need to be on camera — voiceover only keeps production at $0.

organic-vs-who-actually-wins-when-you-se.hook: 🇺🇸 vs 🇲🇽 — who actually wins when you send money home?

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0-8s): Split screen — left side: 'Sending $300 via bank wire to Mexico. Fees: $25. Arrival: 3 days.' Right side: 'Sending $300 via Speed Wallet. Fees: $0. Arrival: 11 seconds.' Beat 2 (9-28s): Creator (or UGC-style) reacts to the comparison: 'They've been charging us HOW MUCH for HOW LONG?' Shows cumulative annual fee loss calculation — '$25 x 12 sends = $300 stolen per year.' Beat 3 (29-48s): Live screen-record of Speed Wallet send completing to a Mexican Lightning address — timestamp visible. Beat 4 (49-60s): 'Keep your $300. Download Speed.' Flag emojis, link in bio.
payload.production_notes: Replicate index-6's flag debate format — the comment bait ('who won?') is intentional virality mechanics. Use CapCut split-screen template. Tag relevant diaspora community hashtags. Film screen-record portion separately and edit in. Total production time: 45 minutes.

organic-it-s-not-as-hard-as-they-made-yo.hook: It's not as hard as they made you think — buying Bitcoin in 60 seconds

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0-6s): Creator to camera, casual setting: 'Everyone told me crypto was complicated. I believed them for 3 years. Then I tried this.' Beat 2 (7-25s): Unboxing-style screen-record of Speed Wallet first-time user flow — download, no KYC friction callout, wallet created, QR code generated. Voiceover: 'No bank account needed. No ID scan. Just open it.' Beat 3 (26-45s): Receive a small amount of Bitcoin live on screen. 'That's it. You just got Bitcoin.' Show balance. Beat 4 (46-60s): 'First time took me under a minute. Link in bio if you want to try.' Creator shrugs — casual, non-salesy.
payload.production_notes: Directly mirrors index-1's myth-busting hook structure with 17.4% ER. Creator must feel genuinely surprised — authentic tone over polished delivery. Film screen-record with phone mirroring or built-in recorder. No music needed; voice carries the beat. Post Wednesday or Thursday for mid-week crypto curiosity traffic.

organic-reply-to-a-comment-what-even-is-.hook: Reply to a comment: 'What even IS the Lightning Network?' — I'll show you in 45 seconds

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0-5s): Show screenshot of the comment question on screen. Creator: 'Great question — most people have never heard of this.' Beat 2 (6-25s): Simple animation or whiteboard-style text: 'Bitcoin is slow and expensive. Lightning sits on top. It makes Bitcoin instant and free. Think Venmo speed, but global, no bank.' Beat 3 (26-45s): Live Speed Wallet demo — send $1 internationally, show 'delivered' in under 15 seconds. 'That just happened.' Beat 4 (46-60s): 'This is what Speed Wallet runs on. Try it free.' Comment CTA: 'Drop a ❓ if you want me to explain more.'
payload.production_notes: Reply-to-comment format from index-20 is native TikTok behavior — use the built-in reply sticker for authenticity. Seed the 'comment question' yourself from a secondary account if needed. Animation can be drawn on a whiteboard or done in CapCut text overlays — $0 production. This post also builds an educational content moat via saves.

paid-you-just-lost-25-again-0-3s-text-sl.hook: You just lost $25. Again. (0-3s) — Text slams onto black screen: '$25 WIRE FEE' with a cash-burning visual. Voiceover: 'Every time you send money home, they take a cut.'
paid-you-just-lost-25-again-0-3s-text-sl.estimate: $1.80-$2.50 (vs $3.17 benchmark — high-intent pain-point targeting with fear-of-loss hook historically beats fintech CPI benchmarks by 20-40%)

payload.problem: (4-8s) Split-screen: left = bank app showing $25 fee + 3-day wait notification. Right = empty hands. Voiceover: 'Banks charge you $25, $35, sometimes more — just to send YOUR money to YOUR family. And it takes DAYS.'
payload.solution: (9-15s) Speed Wallet UI screen-record: open app → enter $300 → tap send → 'Delivered in 9 seconds. Fee: $0.00.' Voiceover: 'Speed Wallet uses Bitcoin Lightning. Zero fees. Lands in seconds. Anywhere in the world.' Green checkmark animation on $0 fee line.
payload.cta: (16-18s) Static card: 'Send your first $300 FREE. Download Speed Wallet.' App store badge. Voiceover: 'Keep every dollar.'
payload.audience: Meta: Lookalike 2% of remittance app installers + interest targeting: 'sending money internationally,' 'wire transfer,' 'Western Union,' Spanish-language households, Filipino-American, Nigerian-American, Latino 25-44 USA

paid-0-3s-creator-on-camera-genuinely-co.hook: (0-3s) Creator on camera, genuinely confused face: 'Wait — I can have Bitcoin... without understanding any of this?' Points to scrolling blockchain jargon on laptop screen behind them.
paid-0-3s-creator-on-camera-genuinely-co.estimate: $2.20-$2.90 (vs $3.17 benchmark — UGC-authentic format consistently outperforms produced creative on TikTok for fintech; curiosity-gap hook reduces skip rate)

payload.problem: (4-8s) Montage of 3 quick cuts: confusing crypto exchange UI, lengthy KYC form, a 'transaction failed' error message. Voiceover: 'Crypto has always felt like it was built for insiders. Not for normal people trying to just... try it.'
payload.solution: (9-15s) Screen-record: Speed Wallet downloaded in App Store → account created with just an email → QR code appears → $5 in Bitcoin received live. Total elapsed time shown: 58 seconds. Creator voiceover: 'No ID. No 12-word seed phrase panic. No fees. I just... had Bitcoin.' Shows balance on screen.
payload.cta: (16-18s) Creator back on camera, smiling: 'Took me less than a minute. Link below.' Lower-third text: 'Download Speed. Your first Bitcoin is waiting.'
payload.audience: TikTok: Interest targeting — cryptocurrency, Bitcoin, personal finance, investing for beginners; behavioral: users who engaged with crypto content but have not installed a crypto app (TikTok pixel modeled audience); age 21-35 USA

paid-0-3s-sound-of-a-casino-chip-hitting.hook: (0-3s) Sound of a casino chip hitting a table. Black screen, then text: 'What if your casino withdrawal hit in 9 seconds?' Voiceover: 'Not tomorrow. Not 3-5 business days. Nine. Seconds.'
paid-0-3s-sound-of-a-casino-chip-hitting.estimate: $2.60-$3.10 (vs $3.17 benchmark — iGaming audience has high LTV justifying near-benchmark CPI; instant-gratification hook aligns with segment psychology; limited creative competition in Lightning+iGaming niche may compress cost)

payload.problem: (4-8s) Animated mockup of a generic iGaming cashier screen showing: 'Withdrawal pending — estimated 3-5 business days.' A clock ticks frustratingly. Voiceover: 'You won. You should have your money NOW. Why are you waiting?'
payload.solution: (9-15s) Speed Wallet deposit + withdrawal screen-record on an iGaming platform that accepts Lightning. Deposit clears instantly — green confirmation. Withdrawal initiated — green confirmation in under 10 seconds on-screen timer. Voiceover: 'Speed Wallet connects to Lightning-enabled casinos. Deposit instantly. Cash out instantly. Zero waiting. Zero bank holds.'
payload.cta: (16-18s) Bold text card: 'Play faster. Cash out faster. Download Speed Wallet.' App store badge. Voiceover: 'Your money. Your speed.'
payload.audience: Meta: Interest targeting — online casino, sports betting, poker, DraftKings, FanDuel, Bitcoin gambling; behavioral: mobile gaming purchasers; age 25-45 USA male skew; exclude regulated gambling restriction states per Meta policy; retarget website visitors who reached cashier page
